aknedit-extensionname: The name of the extension, shown on [[Special:Version]] and in the extension credits.
aknedit-desc:
{{desc|name=Akoma Ntoso Editor|url=https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:AknEditor}}
Short description of the extension, shown on [[Special:Version]].
aknedit-title: Page heading for action=aknedit. $1 is the page's title.
aknedit-not-akn: Shown instead of the editor UI when action=aknedit is opened on a page that isn't using AknRenderer's akn-xml content model.
aknedit-save: Toolbar button label: save the current edit.
aknedit-save-dialog-title: Title of the OOUI process dialog shown when the user clicks Save.
aknedit-save-summary-label: Label for the edit-summary text field in the save dialog.
aknedit-save-confirm: Confirm action label inside the save dialog.
aknedit-save-review: Save dialog action label (save panel only): fetch and show a diff against the last saved revision, matching VE's visualeditor-savedialog-label-review.
aknedit-save-preview: Save dialog action label (save panel only): render the in-editor document without saving, matching VE's showpreview message.
aknedit-save-back: Save dialog action label (review/preview panels only): return to the save panel.
aknedit-cancel: Toolbar button label: discard changes and return to the normal page view.
aknedit-outline-heading: Heading above the structure outline panel (the list of top-level structural elements).
aknedit-outline-collapse: Invisible label/tooltip for an outline row's collapse toggle, shown while the row's children are visible (clicking it hides them).
aknedit-outline-expand: Invisible label/tooltip for an outline row's collapse toggle, shown while the row's children are hidden (clicking it shows them).
aknedit-element-pane-close: Invisible label/tooltip for the close (×) button on the element pane's header, which collapses the split workspace back to a single outline column.
aknedit-add-element: Button label: add a new structural element (opens a menu of element types).
aknedit-remove-element: Button label: remove the selected structural element.
aknedit-remove-confirm: Confirmation dialog text shown before removing a structural element and its contents.
aknedit-move-up: Button label: move the selected element earlier among its siblings.
aknedit-move-down: Button label: move the selected element later among its siblings.
aknedit-metadata-heading: Heading above the metadata form panel.
aknedit-metadata-page-identification: Outline label for the metadata dialog's identification page (title, doctype, number, dates, country, language).
aknedit-metadata-page-publication: Outline label for the metadata dialog's gazette-publication page (showAs, series, number, date).
aknedit-field-alias: Metadata form field label: the document's FRBRalias (title).
aknedit-field-doctype: Metadata form field label: the document type.
aknedit-field-number: Metadata form field label: the document's FRBRnumber.
aknedit-field-enacted: Metadata form field label: the enactment date.
aknedit-field-country: Metadata form field label: the FRBRcountry.
aknedit-field-language: Metadata form field label: the FRBRlanguage.
aknedit-field-fek: Metadata form field label: the gazette's generic name.
aknedit-field-fek-series: Metadata form field label: the gazette series/τεύχος.
aknedit-field-fek-number: Metadata form field label: the gazette issue number.
aknedit-field-fek-date: Metadata form field label: the gazette publication date.
aknedit-not-supported-gazette: Shown instead of the editor UI when action=aknedit is opened on a Gazette: (officialGazette) page — editing that document shape isn't implemented yet.
aknedit-save-error: Error message shown when the save API call fails. $1 is the error detail from the API.
aknedit-tool-undo: Toolbar tool tooltip/title: undo the last document change.
aknedit-tool-redo: Toolbar tool tooltip/title: redo the last undone document change.
aknedit-tool-add: Toolbar tool tooltip/title: add a new structural element.
aknedit-tool-remove: Toolbar tool tooltip/title: remove the selected structural element.
aknedit-tool-moveup: Toolbar tool tooltip/title: move the selected element earlier among its siblings.
aknedit-tool-movedown: Toolbar tool tooltip/title: move the selected element later among its siblings.
aknedit-tool-validate: Toolbar tool tooltip/title: run the lightweight structural sanity check.
aknedit-tool-metadata: Toolbar tool tooltip/title: open the metadata dialog.
aknedit-validate-title: Title of the dialog/message shown after running the structural check.
aknedit-validate-ok: Shown when the structural check finds no problems.
aknedit-validate-issues: Heading shown above the list of problems found by the structural check.
aknedit-validate-dup-eid: One structural-check finding: an eId value is used by more than one element. $1 is the eId value.
aknedit-validate-missing-eid: One structural-check finding: an element that should carry an eId has none.
aknedit-validate-missing-meta: One structural-check finding: the document has no identification/FRBRWork metadata block.
aknedit-validate-missing-body: One structural-check finding: the document body has no structural children.
aknedit-showchanges-title: Title of the dialog showing a diff between the saved revision and the in-editor document.
aknedit-showchanges-none: Shown instead of a diff when the page has no previous revision (base revision id is 0).
aknedit-preview-title: Title of the dialog showing a rendered preview of the in-editor document.
aknedit-elementtype-book: Display name for the AKN <book> structural element type.
aknedit-elementtype-tome: Display name for the AKN <tome> structural element type.
aknedit-elementtype-part: Display name for the AKN <part> structural element type.
aknedit-elementtype-title: Display name for the AKN <title> structural element type.
aknedit-elementtype-subtitle: Display name for the AKN <subtitle> structural element type.
aknedit-elementtype-chapter: Display name for the AKN <chapter> structural element type.
aknedit-elementtype-subchapter: Display name for the AKN <subchapter> structural element type.
aknedit-elementtype-section: Display name for the AKN <section> structural element type.
aknedit-elementtype-subsection: Display name for the AKN <subsection> structural element type.
aknedit-elementtype-division: Display name for the AKN <division> structural element type.
aknedit-elementtype-article: Display name for the AKN <article> structural element type.
aknedit-elementtype-clause: Display name for the AKN <clause> structural element type.
aknedit-elementtype-paragraph: Display name for the AKN <paragraph> structural element type.
aknedit-elementtype-subparagraph: Display name for the AKN <subparagraph> structural element type.
aknedit-elementtype-list: Display name for the AKN <list> structural element type.
aknedit-elementtype-point: Display name for the AKN <point> structural element type.
aknedit-elementtype-indent: Display name for the AKN <indent> structural element type.
aknedit-elementtype-alinea: Display name for the AKN <alinea> structural element type.
aknedit-elementtype-level: Display name for the AKN <level> structural element type.
aknedit-attr-heading: Heading above the generic attribute-editing table in the element details panel.
aknedit-attr-name: Column label: an attribute's name, in the element details panel's attribute table.
aknedit-attr-value: Column label: an attribute's value, in the element details panel's attribute table.
aknedit-attr-add: Button label: commit the empty trailing name/value row as a new attribute.
aknedit-attr-remove: Button label: remove one attribute row from the element details panel.
aknedit-field-num: Element details panel field label: the selected element's <num> text.
aknedit-field-heading: Element details panel field label: the selected element's <heading> text.
aknedit-field-content: Element details panel field label: the selected element's raw <content> markup, edited as an XML-fragment text field.
aknedit-field-content-help: Help text under the content field, explaining it's plain-text markup editing, not a rich-text/WYSIWYG view.
aknedit-field-content-error: Field error shown when the user's edit to the content field isn't well-formed XML and was therefore not applied to the document.
aknedit-field-eid: Label for the read-only field showing the selected element's eId — displayed for reference only, never editable (it's system-generated).
aknedit-inline-b: Content field mini-toolbar tool: wrap the selection in ....
aknedit-inline-i: Content field mini-toolbar tool: wrap the selection in ....
aknedit-inline-u: Content field mini-toolbar tool: wrap the selection in <u>...</u>.
aknedit-inline-term: Content field mini-toolbar tool: wrap the selection in <term refersTo="">...</term>.
aknedit-inline-date: Content field mini-toolbar tool: wrap the selection in <date date="">...</date>.
aknedit-inline-ref: Content field mini-toolbar tool: wrap the selection in <ref href="">...</ref>.
aknedit-inline-sup: Content field mini-toolbar tool: wrap the selection in <sup>...</sup>.
aknedit-inline-sub: Content field mini-toolbar tool: wrap the selection in <sub>...</sub>.
aknedit-inline-mref: Content field mini-toolbar tool: wrap the selection in <mref>...</mref> (a reference to multiple targets).
aknedit-inline-def: Content field mini-toolbar tool: wrap the selection in <def refersTo="">...</def>.
aknedit-inline-entity: Content field mini-toolbar tool: wrap the selection in <entity refersTo="">...</entity>.
aknedit-inline-organization: Content field mini-toolbar tool: wrap the selection in <organization refersTo="">...</organization>.
aknedit-inline-person: Content field mini-toolbar tool: wrap the selection in <person refersTo="">...</person>.
aknedit-inline-role: Content field mini-toolbar tool: wrap the selection in <role refersTo="">...</role>.
aknedit-inline-location: Content field mini-toolbar tool: wrap the selection in <location refersTo="">...</location>.
aknedit-inline-quantity: Content field mini-toolbar tool: wrap the selection in <quantity unit="">...</quantity>.
aknedit-inline-quotedtext: Content field mini-toolbar tool: wrap the selection in <quotedText>...</quotedText>.
aknedit-inline-concept: Content field mini-toolbar tool: wrap the selection in <concept refersTo="">...</concept>.
aknedit-inline-object: Content field mini-toolbar tool: wrap the selection in <object refersTo="">...</object>.
